name: AI Lead Command Center
goal: Operate and improve the live AI Lead Command Center as a durable owner product.
knownFacts: The protected live console is available at https://app.agdigitalz.net/.
The production application runs in its existing isolated VPS stack.
The production web, API, proxy, database, and n8n containers are currently separate from AG OS.
The canonical private source repository is https://github.com/gurnoorbassi/AI-Lead-Command-Center.
scope: Open and operate the protected lead command center.
Track product work, evidence, quality, cost, and lessons in this AG OS workspace.
Route owner commands explicitly to the AI Lead Command Center.
Use the canonical private GitHub repository for reviewed code and production candidates.
outOfScope: Do not change the production application, database, n8n, proxy, credentials, customer data, messages, DNS, or deployment without exact owner approval.
Do not weaken the live application's frame, password, or network protections.
Do not deploy a candidate whose exact commit, backup, rollback, and verification scope are not approved.

risks.risk: The live product handles production services and may contain customer lead data.
risks.mitigation: Keep data and production mutations behind exact approvals and expose only safe operational metadata in AG OS.

risks.risk: The running VPS source can drift from the canonical repository if production deployments are not commit-pinned.
risks.mitigation: Require an exact repository commit, backup, verification, and rollback evidence for every production deployment.

qualityGates: Every completed AG OS job records quality and lesson evidence.
Application and infrastructure validation pass before any deployment candidate.
Secret scanning passes before repository publication.
Live changes use a fresh backup, exact candidate, verification, and rollback plan.
securityReview: The protected production console keeps its existing password and anti-framing protections. AG OS opens it separately and does not ingest customer data.
costTracking: Record estimated and actual task cost. Paid actions require a matching approval and budget.
deploymentPlan: Deploy only exact commits from gurnoorbassi/AI-Lead-Command-Center with a fresh backup, environment-preserving Compose command, health verification, and rollback under separate owner approval.

ownerWorkspace.summary: Operate the protected lead pipeline, workflows, and command center.
ownerWorkspace.previewReason: The protected console intentionally blocks iframe embedding. AG OS keeps your workspace open and launches the secure full app in a separate tab.
ownerWorkspace.sourceControlDetail: Canonical private GitHub repository connected and verified. n8n and production transports remain exact-approval gated.

adapters.detail: Exact branch and draft pull-request work is available after owner approval.
The production n8n endpoint is registered for disabled-workflow creation only after exact owner approval.
Production deployment is registered but remains commit-pinned, backup-first, and separately approval-gated.

operations: Open the full protected lead console.
Give AG OS a command targeted to the AI Lead Command Center.
Review project jobs, evidence, quality, lessons, and cost.
